task_description: Create v0.4 of IND-VIAS DualSight DMS Cockpit with LTEPS company branding, premium visual refinement, realistic center video panel, dense 3D face mesh, OEM engineering left console, intelligent decision card, and premium bottom timeline.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation passes with zero source code errors. Pre-existing tsconfig.node.json reference warnings (TS6306/TS6310) unchanged from base. Tests skipped (vitest available but no meaningful component tests to run). Docker skipped (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY mode). Semantic review completed - 4 of 7 identified issues fixed; remaining 3 are acceptable tradeoffs for a demo dashboard.
